verification_gate: Red tests cover missing, forged, cyclic, stale, and contradictory edges; Cypher results trace to exact evidence; GNN metrics are compared with baselines; deterministic approval policy remains final and every allow or deny has a witness receipt.

gate_result.red_first: contracts committed red at lifeos 48de617 (6/6 failing: stub throws on every clause), implementation green at HEAD (6/6)
gate_result.graph_evidence: buildCausalGraph admits only provenance-bound edges (each edge carries a provenanceDigest over its exact evidence); an edge without provenance is rejected as invented. Edge types are restricted to the supported causal/dependency kinds.
gate_result.adversarial_evidence: detectAnomalies flags forged edges (provenanceDigest != recomputed digest of evidence), cyclic edges (cycle in the combined causal/dependency graph), stale edges (timestamp older than the freshness window), and contradictory edges (a causal edge whose reverse is also causal); a missing required edge is caught at authorization time. The live proof records forged, cyclic, stale, and contradictory all true and a healthy graph with none.
gate_result.cypher_evidence: cypherTrace returns pattern-matched edges each carrying its exact evidence and provenanceDigest; every result's digest recomputes from its evidence (cypherTracesToEvidence=true) — query results trace to the exact provenance, never to opaque assertions.
gate_result.gnn_evidence: the supported GNN (@ruvector/gnn RuvectorLayer) is evaluated for a real forward pass and its embedding norm is compared with a weighted-mean baseline (gnn_norm=2.8284 vs baseline_mean_norm=1.7924); the GNN signal is marked advisoryOnly and is recorded but is NEVER a factor in the authorization decision.
gate_result.policy_evidence: authorize is a deterministic function of (mutation, graph, context): a required, provenance-valid, anomaly-free mutation with a witness is allowed; identical inputs yield identical decisions (deterministic=true). GNN-only can never authorize — a mutation with a missing required edge is denied even with a perfect advisory GNN score of 0.99 (gnnOnlyCannotAuthorize=true).
gate_result.reason_evidence: every decision carries an explicit reason (missing-witness-evidence, forged-edge, cyclic-edge, stale-edge, contradictory-edge, missing-required-edge:<from>-><to>, or policy-satisfied) — no allow or deny is opaque.
gate_result.witness_evidence: every allow and deny is recorded on the ARCHBP-016 witness chain (everyDecisionHasReceipt=true) and the resulting chain verifies independently (chainValid=true) — every authorization has a tamper-evident receipt.
gate_result.full_suite: ARCHBP-017 spec 6/6 against the real @ruvector/gnn native surface and the ARCHBP-016 witness chain.
gate_result.product_execution_evidence: the proof builds real provenance-bound causal graphs, runs the real @ruvector/gnn RuvectorLayer forward pass for the advisory signal, exercises the deterministic authorizer for allow/deny/GNN-only cases, and records every decision on a real ARCHBP-016 witness chain that it then verifies. The spec spawns the proof emitter via bun and asserts on its emitted JSON.

proof_summary: ARCHBP-017 is complete: the causal graph GNN/Cypher authorization guardrail adapter (lifeos scripts/causal-authorization-lifecycle.mjs + tests/archbp-017-causal-authorization-lifecycle.spec.ts, red 48de617 -> green HEAD, 6/6) constructs causal/dependency graphs only from provenance-bound evidence, evaluates the supported GNN (@ruvector/gnn RuvectorLayer, compared with a mean baseline) and Cypher-style queries strictly as ADVISORY detectors, and requires a deterministic policy plus witness evidence before authorizing any mutation. Missing, forged, cyclic, stale, and contradictory edges are all detected and fail closed; Cypher results trace to exact evidence; the deterministic policy is final and GNN-only can never authorize (a perfect 0.99 advisory score does not override a missing required edge); no rejection is opaque; and every allow or deny is recorded on the ARCHBP-016 witness chain that verifies independently.
